briefdescription.para: Helper: collect positive integer exponents that appear in PowerNode expressions within the RelationStore involving the given variable names.
Helper: extract a numeric double value from an Endpoint.

detaileddescription.para: Returns std::nullopt if the endpoint is not a finite numeric value.

briefdescription.para: Helper: check if a NumberNode holds an even integer value.
Helper: check if an exponent NumberNode is exactly -1 (for division detection).
Helper: check if an exponent NumberNode is exactly 2 (for squaring detection).
Helper: check if a NumberNode holds an integer value.

detaileddescription.para: Works for BigInt (always integer), Rational (if denominator == 1), and double (if finite and equal to its floor).

briefdescription.para: Helper: check if a NumberNode holds a positive integer value (> 0).
Helper: check if a NumberNode holds the value 0.
Helper: create a closed Endpoint from a double value.
Helper: create an Interval from two double values [lo, hi].

detaileddescription.para: Implements arithmetic inference rules for addition, multiplication, power expressions, and built-in functions.
